prompt: Generate a stylized art of a ancient marketplace.
prompt_refined: Generate a stylized painting of an ancient marketplace, using image 1 as a structural and compositional guide. The scene should depict a bustling outdoor market with large, distinctive canopies or stalls positioned prominently on the upper left and upper right. In the central mid-ground, a prominent figure is visible, surrounded by the general activity and other, less defined figures and market goods. Emphasize a vibrant and lively atmosphere typical of an ancient trading hub.
objects: large canopy on the upper left
large canopy on the upper right
prominent figure in the central mid-ground
